Kāore tō pūtirotiro e tautoko ana i te WebAudio.

settings.title: Tautuhinga

engines.chiptune3Desc: E tautoko ana i ngā momo hōputu tracker 20+ (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Ka hoki ki FFmpeg mō ētahi atu hōputu.
engines.bassoonDesc: Ka tautoko anake i te .xm / .mod. Ka hoki ki Chiptune3, kātahi ki FFmpeg mō ētahi atu whakatakotoranga.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Ka huri i ngā hōputu ororongo katoa ki te MP3. Te tautoko whānui rawa, te whakaoho āpōpō.

settings.engineDesc: Whiriwhiria te pūkaha oro hei whakamahi. Ko Chiptune3 te mea e tūtohua ana mō te tautoko hōputu tracker pai rawa atu.

tutorialMock.labelFilter: Tāhei puna: Katoa / Makau / Hītori  |  Pouaka rapu: rapu mā te ingoa kōnae, ingoa taitara rānei
tutorialMock.legendEmpty: --- / 00 / … = Kore (kāore he tuhipoka / kāore he whakatangitangi / kāore he pānga)
tutorialMock.annotModeSwitch: Ko te pātene aratau e whakaatu ana i te tohu anake — mā te pāwhiri ka huri haere i ngā aratau whakatangi e whā
tutorialMock.annotScopes: Ngā ngaru ā-whitiwhiti — ia rārangi e whakaatu ana i te ngaru wā-tūturu o tētahi hongere ororongo
tutorialMock.annotAccount: Whakaurunga kore utu · Ko nga tino pai me nga hitori anake e penapena ana · Karekau he aroturuki, karekau he panui
tutorialMock.labelFormatFilter: Pāwhiri "Whakaahua" hei whakatuwhera i te papa kōwhiri-maha · Tātari takirere Āraitai/Rahi · Kōmaka ā-mara-maha

intro.tutorialStep4Title: 4. Te Whakarite i Tō Ake Wheako
intro.tutorialStep5Title: 5. Pūkete, Tino Pai me te Hītori
intro.tutorialStep3Title: 3. Te Whakaaturanga Ora — Tirohanga Tauira me ngā Pūoro
intro.tutorialClosing: Kia hari whakarongo — ā, kia pārekareka te waiata!
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Ka whakaora te Tracker Player i te puoro ki te whakaari i ngā whakaaturanga wā-tūturu e rua e tautoko ana:
intro.tutorialLead: Ka tēnei aratohu koe i roto i ia āhuatanga o Tracker Player, mai i te kimi i tō ara tuatahi ki te whakarite i te purei mō tō mahi.
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Waihanga pūkete kore utu hei whakatuwhera i ētahi atu āhuatanga:
intro.introWelcome: Tōu ki te whakapārekareka i te puoro tracker i roto i ngā momo 68+ — mai i te MOD me XM rongonui ki te MPTM me UMX hou — e tāngo ana i te kohinga nui i
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Ko te rārangi purei te ngākau o Tracker Player. Whakamahia te pae rapu kei runga hei kimi i ngā ripa mā te ingoa kōnae, mā te taitara rānei. Kei raro iho i te pae rapu, ka kitea e koe tētahi huinga tātari kaha:
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Ko te Tracker Player he mea tino whakaritea. Whakauru ki ngā tautuhinga mā te tohu taputapu (pae o runga) me te taringa Tautuhinga (pae taha mauī):
intro.creditsToolchainTitle: Te hōtaka me te wā whakahaere
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Pāwhiritia tētahi ripa i te rārangi purei kia tīmata te purei. Ka uta tonu te purei — ka tīmata te purei o te nuinga o ngā kōnae i raro i te hēkona. I te wā e purei ana tētahi ripa, ka kite koe i:
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Tohutohu matatau: I runga i te pūkoro, tāpirihia te Tracker Player ki tō mata kāinga kia rite ai te wheako ki tētahi taupānga taketake. He pai te mahi hei Taupānga Tukutuku Ahu Whakamua me te keteroki tuimotu.
intro.changelogIntro: Kua whanake haere a Tracker Player mai i tōna tīmatanga hei whakatangi MOD/XM māmā. Anei te rārangi wā o ngā taumata nui:
intro.introTrackerBody3: I tēnei rā, kei te puāwai tonu te puoro tracker i roto i te hapori demoscene o te ao me te hunga kaingākau ki te rorohiko tawhito. Ko te Tracker Player te tūmanako ki te whakamōhio atu ki te nuinga o te iwi ki tēnei momo toi ahurei e mau ana i te hītori o te puoro rorohiko, mā te atamira hou me te whakawhitiwhiti whaihua.
intro.introWhatBody1: Ko te Tracker Player he kaupapa whaiaro tuwhera-puna e whakatapua ana ki te kawe mai i te ataahua o te puoro tracker ki te kaitirotiro hou. Ehara i te miihini ororongo hou, engari he whakaurunga hohonu me te whanaketanga tuarua i hangaia i runga i nga kaupapa tuwhera-puna pai o naianei, e hanga ana i tetahi punaha wheako kaiwhakamahi katoa.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Ko te Tracker Player he kaitākaro noa iho — he papa puoro tracker katoa tōna āhua, he atamai te atamira, he whakaaturanga tauira i te wā tūturu, he oscilloscopes ia-āraitanga, me tētahi kete taputapu i hangaia hei whakamāmā i te kimi me te pārekareka i te puoro tracker i runga i ngā pūrere katoa.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , he pūmanawa Amiga MOD/XM tracker e whakahaere ana i te ipurangi, i tuhia ki te JavaScript mā te Steffest, e whakahoki pono ana i te wheako whakatangi tracker tawhito. I runga i tēnei tūāpapa, ka whakauru haere te kaupapa i te Chiptune3 (he pūkaha WebAssembly i hangaia i runga i te libopenmpt) me te whakawhiti tūmau FFmpeg, e whakawhānui ana i te tautoko hōputu mai i te MOD/XM taketake ki ngā hōputu 68 neke atu.
intro.introWhatBody3: Mai te rapu me te tātari i te rārangi waiata, te whakaata oro, ngā pūnaha pūkete kaiwhakamahi tae atu ki te tautoko i te whakamāoritanga o te ao, kua hangaia e Tracker Player tētahi pūnaha kāhui āhuatanga tāpiri huri noa i te matua o te whakatangi, e whai ana kia pai ai te kaiwhakamahi ki te kounga ahurei o te puoro tracker ahakoa kāore he mātauranga hangarau.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Ko te anga-meta Vue.js e whakakaha ana i tō mātou taha-mua me taha-muri katoa. Ka whakarato a Nuxt i te whakaaturanga taha-tūmau mō te tere uta whārangi me te SEO, te tūmau Nitro mō ngā ara API, te whakauru pātengi raraunga SQLite, me te wehenga-waehere aunoa mō te mahi tino pai.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Ko ngā ara URL pūmau, tiritiri hoki o ia ripa i roto i te Tracker Player. Tāruatia te hononga mai i te pae wāhitau o tō pūtiro i te wā e whakatangi ana tētahi ripa — ka pēnei te āhua /song/123456/filename.mod. Tukuna ki ō hoa, whakairi ki runga i ngā pāpāho pāpori, tohu tohu rānei hei whakamahi ā muri ake. Ka whakatuwhera tonu te hononga i te ripa kotahi.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Ko te puoro tracker (e mohiotia ana ko te puoro module, ko te puoro MOD rānei) he momo puoro matihiko motuhake i puta ake i te mutunga o te tekau tau 1980 i runga i te Commodore Amiga. Kāore i rite ki ngā MP3, ki te oro roma rānei, kei roto i ngā kōnae tracker te tītohunga puoro (ngā tuhipoka, ngā tauira, ngā pānga) me ngā tauira taputapu — pēnei i tētahi kōnae kaupapa puoro motuhake. Nā tēnei, he tino kikokiko ngā kōnae tracker i te wā e taea ai te whakawhitiwhiti i te uauatanga o te puoro.
intro.creditsIntro: Ko te Tracker Player i hanga i runga i ngā pokohiwi o tētahi pūnaha tuwhera-puna whakamīharo. Ko tā mātou whare pukapuka waiata 135,400+ katoa i ahu mai i The Mod Archive — te pātaka tino tika o te ipurangi mō ngā puoro tracker. He tino mihi nui ki ia kaituku mahi nā rātou i taea ai tēnei kaupapa.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Ko te anga CSS whaihua-tuatahi e whakamahia ana mō te whakapaipai. Mā te pūnaha tohu hoahoa o Tailwind e taea ai tō mātou hoahoanga kaupae-16 — ka urutau ngā tae katoa, ngā ātārangi, me ngā taitapa ki te kaupae kōwhiri mā ngā āhuatanga ritenga CSS i hanga mai i tō mātou whirihora Tailwind.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Ko te anga JavaScript ahu whakamua e whakamahia ana mō tā mātou atanga kaiwhakamahi e hāngai ana ki ngā wāhanga. Nā te Vue Composition API, te pūnaha tauhohenga, me ngā wāhanga kōnae kotahi i taea ai te hanga me te tiaki i tētahi atanga kaiwhakaari matatini me te waehere mā, waehere whakahāngai.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Te pātaka puoro whaiaro nui rawa o te ipurangi, e manaaki ana i ngā kōwae neke atu i te 150,000 mai i ngā tini kaitoi puta noa i ngā tekau tau e whā. Ko te Mod Archive te puna kotahi o ngā puoro kei roto i tō mātou whare pukapuka, ā, he whakahaere kore whakakapi mō te hapori whaiaro.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: Ko te API whakairoiro o te kaitirotiro e whakaatu ana i te tirohanga tauira o tā mātou kaiwhai wā-tūturu. Ka tukuna ngā raraunga tuhipoka tauira ki te kānara WebGL i te 60 fps, e whakaputa pono ana i te āhua o ngā tuhipoka panuku o ngā ētita tauira tawhito pērā i a ProTracker me FastTracker II.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: I hanga e Steffest. He whakatinana pono i runga i te tirotiro tukutuku o ngā kaiwhaiwhai MOD me XM tawhito o Amiga — ProTracker me FastTracker II — i tuhia katoatia ki te reo JavaScript. Ka whakarato a BassoonTracker i te whakatangi pono, mahana i tīmata ai tēnei kaupapa, me te tautoko katoa i ngā MOD 4-whakaene tawhito me ngā XM whakaene-maha tae atu ki ngā kōpaki, ngā tātari, me ngā pānga.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Ko te whakatakotoranga W3C Web Audio API e taea ai te tukatuka ororongo iti-roa, kore-kōpīpī i runga i te miro wā-tūturu motuhake. Ko te AudioWorklet te wāhi e whakahaere ai tō mātou pūkaha Chiptune3 i te libopenmpt WASM kua whakahiato, motuhake mai i te miro UI matua, e whakarite ana i te purei maeneene ahakoa te mahi o te atanga.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Ko te mekameka whakahiato e ahu mai ana i LLVM e whakahiato ana i te waehere C/C++ ki te WebAssembly. Ka whakamahia e mātou a Emscripten hei whakahiato i tā mātou libopenmpt kua tāpia — tae atu ki te tukatuka ngaru āhua ake — ki tētahi kōwae WASM kōtahi e mahi ana i te tere tata ki te tere taketake i roto i te AudioWorklet o te kaitirotiro.
intro.introTrackerBody2: I whakatakotoranga i timatahia e Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker i te tau 1987, ā, i tere whanake i roto i te demoscene — he ahurea iti hihiko e whakataetae ai ngā kaihōtaka, kaiwaiata, me ngā tohunga toi ki te hanga i ngā mahi ataata me te oro whakamīharo. I roto i ngā tekau tau, he maha ngā momo whakatakotoranga tracker i puta, ia mea e pana ana i ngā rohe o ngā mea e taea ana: ētahi atu hongere, ngā pānga pai ake, ngā taonga whakatangi kua whakahiatotia, te tautoko VST plugin, tae atu ki ngā pūkenga whakaranu katoa. I ēnei rā, kei te kaha tonu te ao tracker puta noa i te ao, me te whakaputa waiata hou ia rā i runga i ngā pae pēnei i The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: I whakawhanakehia e ngā kaituku OpenMPT. Ko te whare pukapuka whakatangi tracker tuwhera-puna tino whakamārama, e tautoko ana i ngā hōputu modula 68+ me te tino tika. I whakarerekētia e mātou te waehere puna C o libopenmpt — ka tāpiri i tētahi waveform_processor ritenga e hopu ana i te raraunga PCM ia-ārahi i roto i te whakaranu i mua i te putanga whakamutunga — ā, i whakahiatotia ki WebAssembly mā Emscripten. Ko tā mātou hanga WASM kua papaki hei whakakapi i te pōputu kua whakahiatotia i mua e noho tahi ana me Chiptune3, e whakahohe ana i ngā oscilloscopes ia-ārahi, ā, e hanga ana i te tuara wetewete mō ngā hōputu 68+ katoa.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: I hanga e DrSnuggles — he pukapuka JavaScript tuwhera-puna e takai ana i te libopenmpt ki roto i te AudioWorklet mō te whakatangi pūtirotiro o ngā hōputu tracker 68+ ake. Mō tēnei kaupapa, i whakarerekētia e mātou te tukatuka AudioWorklet ki te tango i te raraunga ngaru-ā-ara (hei whakakaha i ngā oscilloscopes ara-maha), i tāpiri te mana whiwhi aunoa, me te whakakaha i te whakahaere tukinga-āhuatanga mō te whakawhiti tere o ngā ara. Ko Chiptune3 te piriti i waenga i te API Aho Oro Tukutuku o te pūtirotiro me te kaha wetewete o tā mātou hanga libopenmpt kua papaki, ā, koia tā mātou pūkaha taunaki taunoa.
tutorialStep1Filters: Tātari Whakatakotoranga — Pāwhiri kia whakatuwhera i te mātiti whiriwhiri-maha o ngā whakatakotoranga e wātea ana. Whakamahia ngā pātene tautuhinga kia tere te kōwhiri i ngā rōpū: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 Katoa (56 whakatakotoranga), rānei Katoa e Tautokona ana.
Tātari Hongongoi — Whakawhāitihia mā te tatau hongongoi: 4 hongongoi (te wā MOD tawhito), 8 hongongoi, 8+ hongongoi rānei (te wā hou maha-ara).
Tātari Rahi — Tātari mā te rahi o te kōnae: iti (<100KB), waenga, nui rānei (>1MB).
Tātari Ingoa Tracker — Tāuruhia he ingoa tracker (hei tauira, "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") hei kimi i ngā puoro i hangaia ki ētahi pūmanawa motuhake.
Ngā Kōwhiringa Kōmaka — Whakaritea te rārangi whakatangi mā te ID, te taitara, te ingoa kōnae, te rahi, te rā whakarerekētanga rānei, i roto i te raupapa piki, heke rānei.
Whiriwhiri Puna — Hurihia i waenga i ngā ripa Katoa, ō Makau, me ō Hītori Whakatangi.
tutorialStep2Details: Ngā Mōhiohio o te Rangi — Ko te taitara, te kaitoi, te hōputu, te tatau hongere, me te tau rangi e whakaaturia ana i runga ake i ngā mana whakahaere o te whakatangi.
Whakatangi/Whakamutu & Whakaterenga — Pātene whakatangi/whakamutu nui me te kaitohu aratau purei: Whakakōaro (matapōkere), Whai Rautaki (raupapa), Kōaro Kotahi, Whakamutu i Muri i te Wā.
Te Waiata e Whai Ake — Pepeke atu ki te waiata e whai ake, ka tuku rānei i tō aratau whakatangi kua kōwhiria hei whakahaere.
Te ōro me te ahu whakamua — Whakatikaina te ōro ki te paetītaha, rapua te ara o te ripa, ka kite i te wā kua pahure/te wā e toe ana.
Pātene Pai — Pāwhiritia te ngākau hei tāpiri i tētahi ripa ki ō makau (me whai pūkete).
Tango — Tiakina te kōnae aroturuki taketake ki tō pūrere.
Hononga ModArchive — Whakatuwheratia te whārangi o te ara i runga i te ModArchive kia kitea ai ētahi atu horopaki me ngā kōrero a te hapori.

Te Puka Mōhiohio o te Aroturuki — Tirohia ngā mōhiohio taipitopito: ingoa aroturuki, rā, roanga, momo ipu, waiata-iti, tatau hongere, taputapu puoro, tauira, raupapa, tauira, me ngā karere kua whakaurua mai i te kaitito.
tutorialStep3Details: Tiro Tauira — Tirohia te raraunga tauira kaitirotiro e panuku ana i te wā tūturu, kua whakaputaina ki WebGL mō te mahi maeneene. Ko ia tīwae he tohu mō tētahi hongere, ko ia rārangi he tohu mō tētahi tūpono tuhi. Ko ngā tuhi, ngā whakatangi, te rōrahi, me ngā whakahau pānga e whakaaturia katoatia ana — pērā i te ētita tauira tawhito. Pāwhiritia te takahuri tauira hei whakawhiti i waenga i ngā whakatakotoranga poutū (tawhito) me te whakapā (whānui).

Ngā Āwhata Ngaru mō ia Hōngongoi — I raro iho i te kaitākaro, ka kite koe i te kāhui whakaaturanga ngaru — kotahi mō ia hōngongoi ororongo i roto i te ara. Ka whakahaerehia ēnei e tā mātou pūtukatuka ngaru taumata-C i hangaia ki roto i te libopenmpt, e tango ana i te ororongo hōngongoi takitahi i mua i te whakaranu whakamutunga. Mātakitaki i te ngaru o ia hōngongoi e pānui ana i te wā tūturu, ka hoatu ki a koe he tohu ataata o te hanga o te waiata — pahū whana i te hōngongoi 1, pahū raro i te hōngongoi 2, arataki i te hōngongoi 3, me ērā atu.
Ka taea te whakakā, te whakaweto rānei i ngā whakaaturanga e rua i roto i ngā Tautuhinga mō te mahi, te manakohanga rānei.
tutorialStep4Settings: Pūoro Pūoro — Whiriwhiria i waenga i BassoonTracker (MOD/XM tawhito), Chiptune3 (e taunakitia ana, 20+ hōputu), rānei FFmpeg (te tautoko hōputu whānui mā te hurihanga tūmau-taha).

Kaupapa — Tīpako mai i ngā kaupapa tae 16. Ko ngā kaupapa mārama ko Mārama, Retro (Solarized), Moana (Teal), Ngahere (Kākāriki), Rōpere (Māwhero), Kikorangi, Māwhero, Cyan, Karaka, me Kiwikiwi. Ko ngā kaupapa pōuri ko Pōuri, Waenganui Pō (Waiporoporo Hōhonu), Koura (Pango & Koura), Waiporopuro, Whero, me Kākāriki.
Reo — 52 ngā reo atanga. Ka tiakina tō kōwhiringa ki te rohe.
Rōrahi — Whakaritea tētahi taumata rōrahi taunoa, me te whakakaha ake i runga i ia ara waiata.
Whakatōpūtanga Teitei — Whakatika aunoa i te pūoro whakatangi kia rite tonu te whakarongo (ka whakahohe i te taunoa).
Tatau Hurihanga Mōrahi — He maha ngā waiata a te kaiwhaiwhai e huri haere tonu ana. Whakaritea he tatau hurihanga mōrahi hei ārai i te purei mutungakore (taunoa: 1).
Ngā Tohu Whakaatu — Whakaatu, huna rānei i te tirohanga ā-awhe, te tirohanga tauira, me te wāhanga whakataki.
tutorialStep5Details: Ngā tino pai — Whakapāhotia tētahi ripa ki te ngākau hei tiaki ki tō rārangi tino pai, e taea ana te uru mai i te kōwhiri puna rārangi whakatangi.
Hītori Whakatangi — Ka tuhia aunoa ngā ripa katoa e whakatangi ana koe. Tirotirohia tō hītori kia kitea anō ngā ripa.
Whakamahinga Whakawhiti Pūrere — Ka whai ō manakohanga me ō hītori i a koe puta noa i ngā pūrere ina takiuru koe.
Tūmataiti — Ko tō pūkete e rongoa ana i ngā mea tino pai me ngā hītori anake. Kāore he raraunga whaiaro e kohia, e tohatohahia rānei.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: He pukapuka o ngā kōnae puoro tracker 135,400+ e 68+ ngā hōputu, mai i ngā MOD 4-whiti ki ngā epics 256-whiti.
Te hanganga pūkaha-toru: BassoonTracker (JS tawhito), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), me FFmpte (whakawhiti taha-tūmau) — ka kōwhiri aunoa mō ia kōnae.
Ko te tirohanga tauira kaiwhai i te wā-tūturu e whakaaturia ana i roto i te WebGL — mātakitaki i ngā tuhipoka e panuku haere ana, pērā i te pūtātau kaiwhai tawhito.
Ngā āhua ngaru hongere-ā-hongere — tirohia te putanga ororongo o ia hongere hei āhua ngaru tāwariwari ora, e whakahaeretia ana e te tangohanga āhua ngaru taumata-C.
He hoahoa urutau e uru pai ana ki ngā mata katoa: rorohiko, papa, waea rānei — tae atu ki te aratau tauira whakapae mō te mata whānui.
16 ngā kaupapa tae āta mahia — mai i te mārama māhorahora ki te pō hōhonu, te retiro solarized, te kōwhai mahana, me ngā mea katoa i waenganui.
E 52 ngā reo atanga — e whakawātea ana i te puoro kaiwhaiwhai ki ngā kaiwhakarongo huri noa i te ao.
Te rapu kaha, te tātari whakatakotoranga whiriwhiri-maha me ngā pātene tautuhi (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, Katoa e Tautokona ana), te tātari tatau hongere, me te kōmaka ā-mara-maha.
Pūnaha pūkete me ngā manakohanga me te hītori purei — tauritehia tō whare pukapuka puta noa i ō pūrere katoa.
Ngā hononga waiata tūturu ka taea te tiri — ka whiwhi ia ripa i tētahi URL ahurei pēnei i /song/123456/filename.mod.
Tango iho i ngā kōnae tracker taketake, tahuri rānei ki te MP3 mā te pāwhiri kotahi.
Te papa mōhiohio ara e whakaatu ana i ngā metadata: taitara, kaitoi, kaiwhai, hōputu, hongere, taputapu puoro, tauira, raupapa, tauira, me te karere whakauru.
Kore rawa, puna-waiwai, ā, e ākina ana e te hapori — kāore he pānui, kāore he aroturuki, kāore he taiepa utu.

trackInfo.title: Taitara
trackInfo.noMeta: Kāore he metadata e wātea ana mō tēnei ripa.

alerts.noTrackPlaying: Kāore he ripa e whakatangi ana.
alerts.favoritesFailed: Kāore i taea te whakahou i ngā makau.
alerts.loginRequired: Tēnā koe, takiuru koe ki te manako i ngā ara.
